karaage-japanese-fried-chicken-with-hone.name: Karaage (japanese Fried Chicken) With Honey Mayoster Sauce
instructions: Whisk 1 1/2 tablespoons soy sauce, 1 tablespoon honey, garlic, and ginger together in a large glass or ceramic bowl. Add chicken and toss to evenly coat. Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and marinate in the refrigerator for 8 hours to overnight.
Remove chicken from marinade and shake off excess. Discard remaining marinade.

Beat egg in a bowl until smooth. Add panko bread crumbs to a shallow bowl. Dip chicken into beaten egg. Lift up so excess egg drips back in the bowl. Press into panko until completely coated. Place the breaded chicken, unstacked, onto a plate. Repeat with remaining chicken.

Heat oil in a deep fryer or large saucepan to 177°C (175 degrees C). Lower chicken carefully into the hot oil in batches. Fry until golden brown, about 5 minutes. Transfer to paper towels to drain. Repeat with remaining chicken.
Whisk Japanese mayonnaise, mirin, 2 tablespoons honey, Dijon mustard, and 1 tablespoon soy sauce together in a bowl; pour sauce over chicken.

karabas-herb-jam-lezzet.name: Karabas Herb Jam
instructions: 1. The most beautiful colors of nature is the exact time for the poor transportation of tables.
2. Cook the water with 4 water cups of water and rub the water.
3. Mix 2 cups of water with 2 cups of boiled water on the other side.
4. Add and boil dust sugar.
5. Particularly squeeze the water of the land weed with you and add sugary water.
6. Boil until it comes to cyclic consistency.
7. Add lemon juice and boil a stone more.
8. Leave it from January and cool.
9. Transfer it to the jar and prepare for the service.

keto-broccoli-salad.name: Keto Broccoli Salad
instructions: Place bacon in a large skillet and cook over medium-high heat, turning occasionally, until evenly browned, about 10 minutes. Drain bacon slices on paper towels. Chop and set aside.
Combine broccoli, cauliflower, carrot, and green onions in a large bowl.
Combine mayonnaise, vinegar, and sour cream in a separate bowl. Beat until smooth. Season with garlic powder and basil.
Pour dressing over vegetables and toss to coat evenly. Chill until flavors meld, about 1 hour.
Serve salad garnished with Cheddar cheese and cilantro.

kheer-raisin-crumble-bliss.name: Kheer: Raisin Crumble Bliss
instructions: Rinse the rice until the water runs clear. Soak the rice in water for 20–30 minutes, then drain.

In a medium heavy-bottomed pot over medium heat, combine the coconut milk and cardamom. Bring the milk to a gentle simmer, then add the drained rice. Simmer, stirring occasionally so the rice does not stick to the bottom, until the milk is reduced by half and the rice is tender, about 30 minutes.
Add the sugar and stir until it dissolves. Remove the pot from the heat and stir in the saffron threads.
Serve the kheer topped with golden raisins and pistachios.
Enjoy!
